ai.title: A Smart System that Thinks with You
ai.text: Our system carefully reviews your health history, symptoms, and any current medications. We don't just give you a template—we build botanical protocols that are safe and specifically suited for you.

verify.title: Complete Transparency at Every Step

about.hero_subtitle: Shafransa is the world’s first clinical-grade botanical ecosystem, merging ancient Caucasian wisdom with advanced neural analytics.
about.story_p1: Founded in the heart of the Caucasus, Shafransa was born from a simple observation: the world of herbal medicine lacked the transparency and scientific rigor of modern pharmaceuticals.
about.story_p2: We set out to change that by building a platform that doesn’t just sell herbs, but provides a verified, data-driven path to wellness.
about.mission_desc: To democratize access to lab-verified botanical medicine through artificial intelligence.
about.vision_desc: A world where every botanical intervention is as precise and safe as molecular medicine.
about.pillars_subtitle: Our methodology is built on a foundation of trust, science, and absolute transparency.
about.pillar1_desc: Every batch of herbs on our marketplace undergoes 3rd party lab testing for heavy metals, pesticides, and microbial contamination.
about.pillar2_desc: Our proprietary Shafransa AI Core™ analyzes thousands of clinical trials to provide evidence-based interaction checks and dosages.
about.pillar3_desc: We work directly with traditional Caucasian harvesters, ensuring fair wages and sustainable wild-crafting practices.

contact.hero_subtitle: Have a question about a botanical protocol or an order? Our team of specialists is here to provide clinical-grade support.
contact.form_success: Message sent! We will contact you soon.
contact.wa_desc: Chat directly with our botanical specialists via WhatsApp for real-time guidance.

how_it_works.hero_title: A Simple Path to Personalized Wellness.
how_it_works.hero_subtitle: We’ve removed the guesswork from herbal medicine. Our four-step process ensures every botanical you take is safe, effective, and tailored exactly to your body.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Tell us about your health goals, current supplements, and wellness history. We listen to the details that matter.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Our system cross-references your profile with clinical research to find the safest, most effective botanical matches.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Order directly from our verified growers. Every product is lab-tested and certified before it ever reaches you.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Receive clear dosages and timing instructions. Your journey is monitored and adjusted as your health evolves.
how_it_works.safety_desc: We don’t just match herbs to symptoms. We cross-reference your entire health profile against known drug-herb interactions.
how_it_works.logistics_desc: Track your herbs from the exact farm in the Caucasus to your doorstep. Full transparency on drying and extraction methods.
how_it_works.human_p1: Generic wellness advice can be risky. We believe that botanical medicine should be as rigorous as anything you’d find in a clinic, but accessible from your home.
how_it_works.human_p2: Our team of researchers and pharmacists constantly update our database to ensure you are receiving the most current, science-backed guidance available.
how_it_works.cta_title: Ready to start your verified journey?
